data_type_evidence: h-e1/code/data.py:84-108 loads torchvision MNIST and FashionMNIST datasets with download=True.
h-m2/code/data_loader.py:19-24 maps both mnist and mnist_alt to datasets.MNIST(...), so H-M2 still uses a real dataset rather than synthetic generation.
h-m3/code/data_loader.py:22-73 loads downstream inputs from the h-e1 CSV via pd.read_csv instead of generating synthetic samples.
h-e1/code/results/experiment_logs.csv:1-6 contains recorded seed-wise MNIST accuracies, confirming executed runs.
h-m2/results/*/seed_*/loss_history.npy and h-m1/results/pairwise_distances_*.npy exist as saved experiment artifacts.
